tools.name: CAP MCP Server
tools.installation: npm package @cap-js/mcp-server; follow the repository setup for the selected client.
tools.authentication: None for local project and documentation access.
tools.assessment: Useful for CAP code context. It does not grant SAP business-system access; keep it limited to trusted project workspaces.

tools.name: UI5 MCP Server
tools.installation: npm package @ui5/mcp-server; use the repository setup instructions.
tools.authentication: None stated for local project tooling.
tools.assessment: Use project-aware validation first. Scaffolding or generated-file changes should stay under normal code review.

tools.name: SAP ADT MCP Server
tools.installation: Enable the ADT MCP server in ABAP Development Tools for VS Code and configure a supported host with the local URL and generated bearer token.
tools.authentication: Local bearer token generated by ADT.
required_services: ABAP Development Tools for VS Code
tools.assessment: A local development bridge, not a passive knowledge source. Scope tools and ABAP authorizations narrowly; do not place its token in a repository or unattended agent configuration.

tools.name: SAP Integration Suite MCP server artifacts
capabilities: MCP server artifact design and lifecycle management
tools.installation: Create and govern an MCP server artifact in an entitled SAP Integration Suite tenant; consult the product documentation and service-plan scope.
tools.authentication: Tenant and API security configuration required.
required_services: SAP Integration Suite service plan with MCP capability
tools.assessment: Treat it as an enterprise integration surface. Require an API owner, explicit tool allow-list, auditability, and separate non-production credentials before exposing any business capability.

tools.name: MCP SAP Docs
tools.installation: Clone or use the published package as documented by the maintainer.
tools.authentication: Verify current configuration; do not provide SAP credentials to a documentation server.
tools.assessment: A community documentation tool, not an authoritative SAP source. Inspect its source list and dependency lockfile before adoption; retain official SAP documentation for product facts.
